settings.intro: Shop black kemp jewellery collections for Bharatanatyam and Kuchipudi costume matching, including sets, necklaces, long harams, mattal, earrings, headset, vaddanam and accessories.
settings.guide_heading: Use black kemp when the costume needs stronger contrast
settings.guide_body: Black kemp jewellery is a separate dance styling path from real kemp and regular gold-plated Bharatanatyam/Kuchipudi jewellery. Choose it when the costume, blouse, stage lighting or school preference calls for black-stone contrast, then keep the necklace, haram, mattal, headset, earrings and vaddanam visually consistent.
